name: build-brief
description: Guard routine Gradle Bash commands by steering Codex toward build-brief.

interface.shortDescription: Steer routine Gradle work through build-brief.
interface.longDescription: Blocks routine raw Gradle Bash commands in Codex and suggests the equivalent build-brief command so Gradle output stays concise and useful for coding-agent context windows.
defaultPrompt: Use build-brief for this Gradle task.
Prefer build-brief over raw gradle for routine builds.
